meta.homeTitle: DriveMaster | Trung tam day bang lai xe A1 A2 B1 B2
meta.homeDescription: Website trung tam day bang lai xe voi landing page tu van, khu vuc hoc vien, dashboard admin, de thi online va noi dung song ngu toi uu SEO.
meta.loginDescription: Trang dang nhap danh cho admin va hoc vien de quan ly khoa hoc, lam bai thi va theo doi ket qua.
meta.examDescription: Hoc vien theo doi khoa hoc cua minh, xem lich su thi, lam bai thi online va quay lai ket qua chi tiet.
meta.resultDescription: Hoc vien xem ket qua dat truot, lich su lam bai va dap an chi tiet sau khi nop bai.
meta.adminTitle: Dashboard admin trung tam day bang lai xe
meta.adminDescription: Dashboard admin de quan ly hoc vien, de thi, cau hoi, ket qua va thong ke trung tam day bang lai xe.

common.footerText: Nen tang web danh cho trung tam day bang lai xe, giup chot lead, quan ly hoc vien va thi online trong cung mot he thong.

footer.linkProcess: Quy trinh hoc va quan ly
footer.supportOne: Admin se tao tai khoan hoc vien sau khi xac nhan dang ky.
footer.supportTwo: Hoc vien co the xem khoa hoc, ket qua dat truot va dap an sau moi lan thi.
footer.supportThree: Dashboard duoc toi uu cho doanh nghiep vua va nho, de theo doi va van hanh.

home.badge: Hoc lai xe thong minh, de van hanh
home.title: Dang ky hoc bang lai nhanh, hoc bai ban, theo doi hoc vien ro rang
home.subtitle: Website danh cho trung tam day bang lai xe gom tu van khoa hoc, dashboard admin, login hoc vien, de thi online va theo doi ket qua sau moi lan nop bai.
home.heroNote: Tai khoan hoc vien do trung tam tao san. Hoc vien chi can dang nhap de xem khoa hoc va ket qua thi cua minh.
home.stat: hoc vien da de lai thong tin
home.trustOneText: Chi admin moi duoc tao hoc vien, cap de thi va theo doi toan bo thong tin trong mot dashboard.
home.trustTwoText: Giao dien to ro, nut bam lon, luong thao tac ngan gon cho nguoi it dung may tinh.
home.trustThreeText: Noi dung duoc viet song ngu de tu van tot hon va ho tro SEO ngay tu dau.
home.introTitle: Mot he thong de dang van hanh cho trung tam va de thao tac cho hoc vien
home.processOneText: Hoc vien de lai thong tin, trung tam goi lai, chot khoa hoc va lich hoc phu hop.
home.processTwoText: Admin tao tai khoan hoc vien, gan khoa hoc va thong bao thong tin dang nhap.
home.processThreeText: Hoc vien dang nhap, xem khoa hoc cua minh, thi online va xem lai dap an sau moi lan nop.
home.processFourText: Dashboard admin cap nhat ngay ket qua thi, luot dang ky va tien do xu ly hoc vien.
home.packagesTitle: Lua chon lo trinh hoc phu hop nhu cau cua hoc vien
home.packageA1: Khoa co ban cho hoc vien thi bang xe may pho thong, lich hoc gon va de trien khai nhanh.
home.packageA2: Danh cho hoc vien can dieu khien xe mo to phan khoi lon va muon hoc bai ban.
home.packageB1: Lo trinh hoc cho xe so tu dong, co ket hop ly thuyet va huong dan sat hach.
home.packageB2: Khoa hoc pho bien nhat, co thi online, theo doi lan thi va dashboard quan ly.
home.feedbackTitle: Cam nhan tu hoc vien va doi ngu van hanh
home.feedbackOne: Minh dang ky B2 rat nhanh, duoc nhac lich hoc va login vao he thong de theo doi ket qua rat ro rang.
home.feedbackTwo: Admin xem duoc lead, hoc vien, cau hoi va ket qua thi tren cung mot dashboard nen rat de quan ly.
home.feedbackThree: Giao dien mobile muot, co tieng Anh va tieng Viet nen tu van cho nhieu doi tuong hon.
home.formTitle: Nhan tu van lo trinh va hoc phi trong 5 phut
home.formSupport: Responsive, AJAX submit, luu data cho admin dashboard va toi uu cho nguoi dung lan dau truy cap.
home.formPointOne: Khong can tao tai khoan de gui yeu cau tu van
home.formPointTwo: Admin lien he lai va tao tai khoan hoc vien sau khi chot dang ky
home.formPointThree: Thong tin duoc luu ngay de trung tam theo doi va bao cao
home.ctaTitle: San sang bat dau hanh trinh lay bang lai xe?
home.ctaText: Nhan tu van ca lo trinh hoc, hoc phi va lich sat hach phu hop ngay hom nay.
home.toastMissingFields: Vui long dien day du cac truong bat buoc.
home.toastRegistrationSuccess: Dang ky da duoc gui thanh cong.

login.title: Dang nhap he thong
login.subtitle: Admin quan ly dashboard, hoc vien vao khu vuc khoa hoc cua minh, lam bai thi va xem ket qua sau moi lan nop.
login.hint: Neu ban chua co tai khoan, vui long lien he trung tam de duoc cap thong tin dang nhap.
login.helperOne: Chi admin moi co quyen tao tai khoan hoc vien.
login.sideTitle: Website duoc toi uu cho doanh nghiep nho va vua
login.sideOne: Admin xem lead, hoc vien, ket qua thi va de thi trong mot khu vuc duy nhat.
login.sideTwo: Hoc vien vao mot trang don gian de xem khoa hoc cua minh va lam bai thi.
login.sideThree: Ho tro song ngu Tieng Viet va English cho thao tac de hieu hon.

student.heroCopy: Day la noi de hoc vien xem khoa hoc cua minh, theo doi ket qua dat hay chua dat va lam de thi online de on tap.
student.courseTitle: Thong tin khoa hoc cua toi
student.nextStepOne: Xem thong tin khoa hoc va ten de thi o phan tren.
student.nextStepTwo: Lam bai thi va nop bai mot cach binh tinh, he thong se cham diem ngay.
student.nextStepThree: Neu chua dat, ban co the xem lai dap an va lam lai de on tap them.
student.historyTitle: Lich su bai thi cua toi
student.historyCopy: Hoc vien co the xem trang thai dat hay chua dat va mo lai chi tiet tung lan thi.
student.historyEmpty: Ban chua co lan thi nao.
student.noAttemptCopy: Ban chua nop bai thi nay.
student.noAssignedExam: Chua co de thi duoc giao.

exam.title: Phong thi online
exam.subtitle: Xin chao
exam.empty: Hien chua co de thi dang mo.
exam.toastRetakeAvailable: Hoc vien co the lam lai. He thong se luu them mot lan thi moi.

result.title: Ket qua bai thi
result.noCriticalFail: Khong co loi do cau liet.
result.historyCopy: Hoc vien co the theo doi cac lan thi va trang thai dat hay chua dat.
result.reviewCopy: Xem cau da chon, dap an dung va phan giai thich do admin cung cap.
result.noExplanation: Chua co giai thich cho cau hoi nay.

admin.title: Dashboard admin
admin.studentsTableCopy: Danh sach tai khoan hoc vien duoc tao boi admin.
admin.registrationsTableCopy: Lead moi tu landing page se do ve day de admin theo doi.
admin.examListCopy: Tao, sua va xoa de thi bang modal, sau khi luu dashboard se cap nhat ngay.
admin.recentResultsCopy: Theo doi trang thai dat truot va cau liet ngay trong dashboard.
admin.questionListCopy: Filter theo de, cau liet va tim nhanh de quan ly bo cau hoi.
admin.searchQuestionPlaceholder: Nhap tu khoa de tim noi dung cau hoi
admin.heroCopy: Theo doi hoc vien, luot dang ky, ket qua thi va quan ly du lieu trung tam trong mot man hinh.
admin.overviewCopy: So lieu duoc cap nhat ngay sau moi thao tac tren dashboard.
admin.modalStudentCopy: Them hoc vien moi va cap ngay vao danh sach quan ly.
admin.modalExamCopy: Luu xong, danh sach de thi va dashboard se cap nhat ngay.
admin.modalQuestionCopy: Quan ly nhanh bo cau hoi va cau liet bang form popup.
admin.confirmBody: Ban co chac chan muon thuc hien thao tac nay khong?
admin.deleteExamBody: Ban co chac chan muon xoa de thi nay khong?
admin.deleteQuestionBody: Ban co chac chan muon xoa cau hoi nay khong?
admin.emptyQuestions: Khong tim thay cau hoi phu hop bo loc hien tai.
admin.toastStudentCreated: Da tao tai khoan hoc vien thanh cong.
admin.toastExamSaved: Da luu de thi thanh cong.
admin.toastQuestionSaved: Da luu cau hoi thanh cong.
